name: create_prefab
description: Create a prefab asset from a GameObject in the scene. The scene instance becomes linked to the prefab. Includes all components, children, and their settings.

game_object.description: The name of the scene GameObject to save as a prefab.

path.description: Optional. Folder path for the prefab. Defaults to 'Assets/Prefabs'.

file_name.description: Optional. Prefab file name (without or with .prefab extension). Defaults to the GameObject's name.

overwrite.description: Optional (default false). If true, overwrites an existing prefab at the same path.
